history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian man is taking a mirror selfie in a hotel hallway. He is wearing a light beige, collared jacket with white stripes on the sleeves and traditional Chinese frog button closures. Underneath, he has on loose-fitting, dark grey jeans and white slip-on sneakers. A black crossbody bag is slung over his shoulder. His left hand is in his pocket, and he holds his phone up to take the picture, the flash illuminating his face.

The hallway has textured, light beige walls on the left and a darker, patterned wall with wood accents on the right. A patterned green carpet runs down the center of the hallway. The lighting is dim, with a strong spotlight effect from the phone's flash. The overall mood is casual and contemporary, with a hint of Asian fusion in the man's attire. The color palette is dominated by neutral tones of beige, grey, and green, with pops of white from the clothing details.
